mapper.update: update base_entrust_relationship set default_flag= #{bean.defaultFlag}, business_org_id=#{bean.bizOrgId}, account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, settment_org_id = #{bean.settleOrgId}, remark = #{bean.remark}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, state=#{bean.state}, modified_name=#{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where id = #{bean.id}

update base_entrust_relationship set account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, settment_org_id = #{bean.settleOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name=#{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where business_org_id = #{bean.bizOrgId} and entrust_source = 4 and entrust_range = 2 and entrust_type = 6

update base_entrust_relationship set account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, settment_org_id = #{bean.settleOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name=#{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where entrust_source = 0 and entrust_source_id = #{bean.entrustSourceId} and entrust_range = 2 and entrust_type = 6
mapper.select: select id as id, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, business_org_id as bizOrgId, settment_org_id as settleOrgId, account_org_id as accountOrgId FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE business_org_id = #{businuessOrgId} and entrust_type = 6 and entrust_range= 2 and deleted_flag=0

select id as id, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, business_org_id as bizOrgId, settment_org_id as settleOrgId, account_org_id as accountOrgId FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE business_org_id = (select business_org_id from base_entrust_relationship where id = #{entrustId}) and entrust_type = 6 and entrust_range= 2 and deleted_flag=0
mapper.update:
update base_entrust_relationship set state = #{bean.state},
start_time = #{modifiedDate},
stop_time = #{modifiedDate},
modified_by = #{bean.userId}, modified_name = #{bean.userName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate} where entrust_source = 0 and entrust_source_id = #{bean.id}
mapper.sql: group_id, entrust_range, entrust_type, entrust_source, entrust_source_id, default_flag, state, business_org_id, account_org_id, settment_org_id, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date
mapper.select: select id, business_org_id, settment_org_id, account_org_id, state, created_by, created_date, remark, modified_by,modified_name, modified_date from base_entrust_relationship

SELECT id, business_org_id, settment_org_id, account_org_id, default_flag FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE entrust_type = 6 and state = 1
and business_org_id in
#{orgId}
group by business_org_id
